title: peristylus neglectus
intro: Peristylus neglectus, also known as the Himalayan orchid or the Himalayan slipper orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Peristylus neglectus are often used to make teas, tinctures, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
